article.title: Microsoft offer query
article.content:
Hi fellows,

How many days Microsoft requires to release the offer letter after the payslips and other documents have been submitted.

Also, do they run a BGV check before releasing the offer letter or is it done afterwards?

post.content: I saw many posts about appointment letter, isnt the date already mentioned on offer letter for joining or it works different?
For me the verbal offer and releasing the offer both happened at same time. Later BGV starts and told it takes 2 weeks.
They first discusse with you the offer verbally and then release offer letter within a week. And then BGV starts.\n\nWhich team you are getting hiered for?
5+ working days for offer rollout and once you have accepted the offer, they start BGV
